protectedNote: Candidate area. Access control is added in Phase 2; this preview shows the calm working layout and its states.

dashboard.title: Welcome back
dashboard.description: Here's where your applications, matches, and next steps live.

completeProfile.title: Complete your profile
completeProfile.body: Add your basic details so employers and matches stay accurate.

uploadResume.title: Upload your resume
uploadResume.body: Add a current resume so you can apply to roles in one step.

browseJobs.title: You're ready to apply
browseJobs.body: Your profile and resume are set. Find roles that fit and apply.

completion.label: Profile completion
completion.incomplete: Finish your profile to improve matching.

snapshot.title: Application snapshot
snapshot.emptyBody: Apply to a role and your progress will appear here. (Applications arrive in a later phase.)

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: Keep your details current so employers and matches stay accurate.
profile.editLead: Update your details and preferences. Your resume is managed separately.

sections.preferencesHint: Optional — these help us match you to relevant roles.

resume.title: Resume
resume.description: Manage the resume employers see when you apply.
resume.privacyNote: Your resume stays private. It is only shared with roles you apply to, and it is never exposed as a public link.
resume.emptyBody: Add a PDF or DOCX (up to 5 MB) so you can apply to roles.
resume.inputHint: PDF or DOCX, up to 5 MB.
resume.removeConfirmBody: Remove your resume? You will need to upload one again before you can apply.

applications.title: Your applications
applications.description: Track every application and its current stage.
applications.emptyBody: When you apply to a role, it will appear here with its status history.

applicationDetail.title: Application
applicationDetail.notFoundBody: This application could not be found, or you don't have access to it.

savedJobs.title: Saved jobs
savedJobs.emptyBody: Save roles from search or a job page to find them here.

support.title: MHA support
support.description: Request help with your applications or career direction.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account, language, and notifications.
settings.emptyBody: Account settings will be available once accounts are connected in Phase 2.
